_doc: Raven Hollow hidden debuffs / curses (BACKLOG #36, design/HIDDEN_DEBUFFS.md). Curses/afflictions applied SILENTLY (no toast, no obvious HUD icon) with a discovery condition (inspect / cleanse-item / quest / stage-reached). Consumed by scripts/systems/trainer_system.gd. The world writes on you: curiosity is the vector, warmth is the symptom. Contract law (doc sec 1): while hidden an effect never deals direct HP damage and never moves a stat > ~10%. stat_mods use StatsSystem keys (hp/armor/speed_pct/crit_pct/mana_regen/damage) and ride the SAME StatsSystem modifier bus StatusSystem uses. status_mirror (optional) names an existing data/status_effects.json effect that surfaces on the visible debuff bar the moment the hidden effect is REVEALED - the honest 'hidden thing left alone becomes a visible worse thing' escalation. wash = which of Hessik's four detection washes reveals it (blue|violet|green|orange).

copperbelly.name: Copperbelly
copperbelly.symptom: The stew sits in you like river-water. The yeast dies in you.

warm_soled.name: Warm-Soled
warm_soled.symptom: Your footsteps steam. Snow will not settle on you.

pack_scent.name: Pack-Scented
pack_scent.symptom: Distant howls grow more frequent. They marked you three fights ago.

greywolf_tick.name: Greywolf Tick
greywolf_tick.symptom: A single scratch sound, a tiny shiver. Something rides you.

bog_sour.name: Bog-Sour
bog_sour.symptom: Squelching footsteps on dry land. Vendors take a step back.

grave_dim.name: Grave-Dim
grave_dim.symptom: The minimap darkens from the edges. The dead lie thickest where you cannot see.

thread_crossed.name: Thread-Crossed
thread_crossed.symptom: Your summons stop and face north. The dead you kill stand back up, take a step, and fall.

blood_tithed.name: Blood-Tithed
blood_tithed.symptom: Your reflection renders paler. Your footsteps stop making sound.

marked.name: Marked
marked.symptom: Blestem vendors overcharge you. Gate guards greet you by a name you never gave.

moon_fever.name: Moon-Fever
moon_fever.symptom: At nightfall you feel wonderful - stronger, faster, a red vignette, a heartbeat under the music. The crash comes at dawn.

under_hearing.name: Under-Hearing
under_hearing.symptom: Surface sound ducks; a low rumble rises over buried tunnels. You can hear the under.

collected.name: Collected
collected.symptom: Your gold counts down, one coin a minute, each tick a faint stamp. A debt-tablet with your name appears in your bag.
